convert-pdf-to-docx.title: Convert PDF to DOCX with Layout Preservation
convert-pdf-to-docx.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF file to a DOCX document using Aspose.Pdf with the Textbox recognition mode to preserve the original layout.

pdf-to-docx-enhanced.title: Convert PDF to DOCX with Enhanced Table and Graphic Recognition
pdf-to-docx-enhanced.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF file to DOCX format using Aspose.Pdf with enhanced recognition mode to better handle complex tables and graphics.

convert-pdf-to-docx__v2.title: Convert PDF to DOCX with Default Text Extraction
convert-pdf-to-docx__v2.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF file to DOCX format using Aspose.Pdf with default text extraction settings.

pdf-to-doc-images-only.title: Convert PDF to DOC with Images Only
pdf-to-doc-images-only.description: Converts a PDF file to a Word document extracting only the images using a custom recognition mode.

convert-pdf-to-docx-auto.title: Convert PDF to DOCX with Automatic Content Detection
convert-pdf-to-docx-auto.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF file to DOCX format using DocSaveOptions with Mode set to Auto for automatic content detection.

pdf-to-doc-text-mode.title: Convert PDF to DOC with Text Extraction Mode
pdf-to-doc-text-mode.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF file to a DOC file using DocSaveOptions with the recognition mode set to extract plain text.

convert-pdf-to-docx__v3.title: Convert PDF to DOCX with Custom Metadata
convert-pdf-to-docx__v3.description: Loads a PDF, sets the author and title metadata, and saves it as a DOCX file.

pdf-to-docx-footnotes.title: Convert PDF to DOCX with Footnotes Preservation
pdf-to-docx-footnotes.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF to DOCX while preserving footnotes using enhanced recognition mode for accurate extraction.

convert-pdf-to-docx-extract-images.title: Convert PDF to DOCX and Extract Embedded Images
convert-pdf-to-docx-extract-images.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF file to DOCX format and extracting all embedded images to a designated folder.

pdf-to-docx-summary.title: Convert PDF to DOCX and Generate Conversion Summary
pdf-to-docx-summary.description: Loads a PDF, converts it to DOCX using Aspose.Pdf, and creates a JSON report with conversion statistics.

pdf-to-docx-zip.title: Convert PDF to DOCX and compress to ZIP
pdf-to-docx-zip.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF file to DOCX format using Aspose.Pdf and then compressing the DOCX into a ZIP archive for storage.

pdf-to-docx-to-pdfa.title: Convert PDF to DOCX and then to PDF/A
pdf-to-docx-to-pdfa.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF file to DOCX format and then creating a PDF/A‑1B compliant PDF from the DOCX output.

pdf-to-docx-hyphenation.title: Convert PDF to DOCX with Language‑Specific Hyphenation
pdf-to-docx-hyphenation.description: Loads a PDF, sets hyphenation language to improve text flow, and saves it as a DOCX file.

convert-pdf-to-docx-add-table-of-figures.title: Convert PDF to DOCX and Add Table of Figures
convert-pdf-to-docx-add-table-of-figures.description: Loads a PDF, extracts its images, creates a table of figures listing each image and its page, then converts the PDF to a DOCX file.

pdf-to-docx-embed-fonts.title: Convert PDF to DOCX with Embedded Custom Fonts
pdf-to-docx-embed-fonts.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF file to DOCX while embedding specified custom fonts to preserve the document's visual appearance.

convert-pdf-to-pptx.title: Convert PDF to PPTX Slides
convert-pdf-to-pptx.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF document to editable PowerPoint (PPTX) slides using Aspose.Pdf with default options.

pdf-to-pptx-slides-as-images.title: Convert PDF to PPTX with Slides as Images
pdf-to-pptx-slides-as-images.description: Converts a PDF file to a PPTX presentation where each slide is rendered as a raster image using Aspose.Pdf.

convert-pdf-to-pptx-with-progress.title: Convert PDF to PPTX with Custom Progress Handler
convert-pdf-to-pptx-with-progress.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF file to PPTX format while reporting conversion progress via a custom IProgressHandler implementation.

batch-convert-pdf-to-pptx-slidesasimages.title: Batch Convert PDFs to PPTX with SlidesAsImages
batch-convert-pdf-to-pptx-slidesasimages.description: Converts all PDF files in a folder to PPTX presentations where each slide is rendered as an image.

convert-pdf-to-pptx-progress.title: Convert PDF to PPTX with Progress Logging
convert-pdf-to-pptx-progress.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF file to PPTX format while logging conversion progress via a custom progress handler.

pdf-to-pptx-slides-as-images__v2.title: Convert PDF to PPTX with Slides as Images and High DPI
pdf-to-pptx-slides-as-images__v2.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF to a PPTX file where each slide is rendered as an image and the image resolution (DPI) is set for high‑quality output.

pdf-to-pptx-compress.title: Convert PDF to PPTX and Compress the Result
pdf-to-pptx-compress.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF document to PPTX using Aspose.Pdf and then compressing the PPTX file into a ZIP archive for easier distribution.

pdf-to-pptx-protect.title: Convert PDF to PPTX and Protect with Password
pdf-to-pptx-protect.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF file to PowerPoint (PPTX) format using Aspose.Pdf and then applying password protection to the resulting PPTX using Aspose.Slides.

pdf-to-pptx-to-pdfa.title: Convert PDF to PPTX and then to PDF/A for archival
pdf-to-pptx-to-pdfa.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF file to PPTX format and then creating a PDF/A version from the PPTX output for long‑term archiving.

pdf-to-pptx-with-notes.title: Convert PDF to PPTX with Annotations as Speaker Notes
pdf-to-pptx-with-notes.description: Shows how to convert a PDF file to a PowerPoint PPTX presentation while embedding PDF annotations as speaker notes on each slide.

convert-pdf-to-pptx-embed-fonts.title: Convert PDF to PPTX with Embedded Fonts
convert-pdf-to-pptx-embed-fonts.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF file to a PPTX presentation while embedding font glyphs to preserve appearance.

pdf-to-pptx-apply-slide-master.title: Convert PDF to PPTX and Apply Custom Slide Master
pdf-to-pptx-apply-slide-master.description: Converts a PDF file to PPTX using Aspose.Pdf and then applies a custom slide master template to all slides using Aspose.Slides.

pdf-to-pptx-extract-images.title: Convert PDF to PPTX and Extract Images from Slides
pdf-to-pptx-extract-images.description: Converts a PDF file to PPTX using Aspose.Pdf and then extracts all images from the generated slides using Aspose.Slides.

pdf-to-pptx-export-titles.title: Convert PDF to PPTX and Export Slide Titles to CSV
pdf-to-pptx-export-titles.description: Shows how to convert a PDF document to PowerPoint (PPTX) format and then extract each page's first line as a slide title, saving the titles into a CSV file.

pdf-to-pptx-add-logo.title: Convert PDF to PPTX and Add Company Logo to Each Slide
pdf-to-pptx-add-logo.description: Loads a PDF, stamps a company logo on every page, then converts the document to PPTX format.

pdf-to-pptx-add-speaker-notes.title: Convert PDF to PPTX and Add Speaker Notes
pdf-to-pptx-add-speaker-notes.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF file to PowerPoint (PPTX) using Aspose.Pdf and then adding speaker notes to each slide with Aspose.Slides.

pdf-to-single-page-html.title: Convert PDF to Single‑Page HTML with Embedded Resources
pdf-to-single-page-html.description: Loads a PDF, configures HtmlSaveOptions to embed fonts, images, and CSS, and saves the document as a single HTML file preserving the original layout and typography.

pdf-to-multi-page-html.title: Convert PDF to Multi‑Page HTML with SplitIntoPages
pdf-to-multi-page-html.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF into separate HTML files per page by enabling the SplitIntoPages option.

pdf-to-html-with-svg.title: Convert PDF to HTML with SVG images saved to a folder
pdf-to-html-with-svg.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF file to HTML while directing generated SVG images to a specific directory.

pdf-to-html-compress-svg.title: Convert PDF to HTML with SVG Image Compression
pdf-to-html-compress-svg.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF file to HTML while compressing embedded SVG images to reduce the output size.

pdf-to-html-png-background.title: Convert PDF to HTML with PNG page background
pdf-to-html-png-background.description: Converts a PDF document to HTML where each page's background is rendered as a single PNG image.

pdf-to-html-split-pages.title: Convert PDF Pages to Separate HTML Files
pdf-to-html-split-pages.description: Demonstrates converting each page of a PDF into its own HTML file using HtmlSaveOptions.SplitIntoPages.

pdf-to-html-toc.title: Convert PDF to HTML with Table of Contents
pdf-to-html-toc.description: Converts a PDF to separate HTML pages and creates a simple HTML table of contents linking each page.

pdf-to-html-per-page-images.title: Convert PDF to HTML with per-page image folders
pdf-to-html-per-page-images.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF to HTML while saving each page's images into separate subfolders for organized assets.

pdf-to-html-compress-svg__v2.title: Convert PDF to HTML with SVG Compression
pdf-to-html-compress-svg__v2.description: Converts a PDF file to HTML while enabling SVG image compression to reduce asset size.

pdf-to-html-png-background__v2.title: Convert PDF to HTML with PNG page backgrounds
pdf-to-html-png-background__v2.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF file to HTML while rendering each page background as a single PNG image.

pdf-to-html-and-back.title: Convert PDF to HTML and back to PDF
pdf-to-html-and-back.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF to a single HTML file, then loading that HTML and saving it back to PDF.

pdf-to-html-zip.title: Convert PDF to HTML and Package into ZIP Archive
pdf-to-html-zip.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF to HTML pages with external resources and zipping the resulting files for distribution.

pdf-to-html-minify.title: Convert PDF to HTML and Minify Output
pdf-to-html-minify.description: Converts a PDF file to HTML using Aspose.Pdf and then minifies the generated HTML to reduce file size for faster web loading.

pdf-to-html-embed-fonts.title: Convert PDF to HTML with Embedded Custom Fonts
pdf-to-html-embed-fonts.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF to HTML while embedding fonts using @font-face rules via HtmlSaveOptions.

pdf-to-responsive-html.title: Convert PDF to Responsive HTML
pdf-to-responsive-html.description: Converts a PDF document to HTML and injects a mobile‑friendly responsive CSS stylesheet.

pdf-to-html-with-custom-css.title: Convert PDF to HTML with Custom CSS
pdf-to-html-with-custom-css.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF to HTML using Aspose.Pdf and applying a custom CSS file via HtmlSaveOptions.

pdf-to-html-sitemap.title: Convert PDF to HTML Pages and Generate Sitemap XML
pdf-to-html-sitemap.description: Converts a PDF into separate HTML pages using Aspose.Pdf and creates an XML sitemap that lists the generated HTML files for SEO.

pdf-to-html-index.title: Convert PDF to HTML with per-page files and generate index
pdf-to-html-index.description: Converts a PDF into separate HTML files per page and creates an index.html linking to each generated page.

pdf-to-html-docx-embed-fonts.title: Convert PDF to HTML and then to DOCX with Embedded Fonts
pdf-to-html-docx-embed-fonts.description: Shows how to convert a PDF to HTML and subsequently load the HTML to produce a DOCX file with custom fonts embedded for consistent rendering.

pdf-to-html-embed-font-pptx.title: Convert PDF to HTML and Embed Custom Font into PPTX
pdf-to-html-embed-font-pptx.description: Shows how to convert a PDF to a single HTML file with embedded fonts and then create a PowerPoint presentation that embeds the same custom font for consistent appearance.

pdf-to-bmp.title: Convert PDF Pages to BMP Images
pdf-to-bmp.description: Converts each page of a PDF document to separate BMP image files using Aspose.Pdf's BmpDevice with default settings.

convert-pdf-to-jpeg.title: Convert PDF Pages to JPEG Images
convert-pdf-to-jpeg.description: Demonstrates converting each page of a PDF document into separate JPEG images using Aspose.Pdf's JpegDevice with default quality.

pdf-to-gif.title: Convert PDF Pages to GIF Images
pdf-to-gif.description: Demonstrates how to convert each page of a PDF document into separate GIF images using Aspose.Pdf's GifDevice with default settings.

pdf-to-png-transparent.title: Convert PDF to PNG Images with Transparent Background
pdf-to-png-transparent.description: Converts each page of a PDF document to PNG images using PngDevice and enables a transparent background for the output images.

pdf-to-emf.title: Convert PDF to EMF Images Preserving Vector Data
pdf-to-emf.description: Converts each page of a PDF document to an EMF image using EmfDevice, preserving vector graphics.

pdf-to-multi-page-tiff.title: Convert PDF to Multi-Page TIFF
pdf-to-multi-page-tiff.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF document into a single multi-page TIFF image using Aspose.Pdf's TiffDevice.

convert-pdf-to-svg.title: Convert PDF to SVG Images using DocumentDevice
convert-pdf-to-svg.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF document to SVG images using Aspose.Pdf's DocumentDevice (SvgDevice) with default options.

pdf-to-multipage-tiff.title: Convert PDF to Multi‑Page TIFF
pdf-to-multipage-tiff.description: Converts all pages of a PDF document into a single multi‑page TIFF image using Aspose.Pdf's TiffDevice with default settings.

pdf-page-region-to-png.title: Convert PDF Page Region to PNG Image
pdf-page-region-to-png.description: Extracts a defined rectangular region from a PDF page and saves it as a PNG image.

convert-pdf-page-to-jpeg.title: Convert PDF Page to JPEG Image
convert-pdf-page-to-jpeg.description: Demonstrates how to extract a specific page from a PDF and save it as a JPEG image using Aspose.Pdf's JpegDevice with the default resolution.

batch-pdf-to-png.title: Batch Convert PDFs to PNG Images Preserving Folder Structure
batch-pdf-to-png.description: Recursively scans a source folder for PDF files, converts each page to PNG, and saves the images in an output folder mirroring the original hierarchy.

batch-convert-pdf-to-jpeg.title: Batch Convert PDFs to JPEG Images
batch-convert-pdf-to-jpeg.description: Converts all PDF files in a folder to JPEG images, one image per page, using a custom naming pattern.

batch-convert-pdfs-to-multi-page-tiff.title: Batch Convert PDFs to Multi‑Page TIFF
batch-convert-pdfs-to-multi-page-tiff.description: Converts each PDF file in a folder into a single multi‑page TIFF image using Aspose.Pdf.

convert-pdf-to-pdfa-1b.title: Convert PDF to PDF/A-1b with Validation
convert-pdf-to-pdfa-1b.description: Loads a PDF, validates it for PDF/A‑1b compliance, converts it to PDF/A‑1b, validates the result, and saves both the PDF/A file and validation logs.

convert-pdf-to-pdfa3b-font-substitution.title: Convert PDF to PDF/A‑3b with Font Substitution
convert-pdf-to-pdfa3b-font-substitution.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF to PDF/A‑3b while substituting missing fonts using the FontSubstitution feature.

convert-pdf-to-pdfa4-auto-tagging.title: Convert PDF to PDF/A‑4 with Auto‑Tagging
convert-pdf-to-pdfa4-auto-tagging.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF to PDF/A‑4 while enabling automatic tagging using AutoTaggingSettings during the conversion process.

convert-pdf-to-pdfa1b-skip.title: Convert PDF to PDF/A-1b with Skip Error Action
convert-pdf-to-pdfa1b-skip.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF to PDF/A‑1b while skipping (deleting) elements that cannot be converted.

convert-pdf-to-pdfa4.title: Convert PDF to PDF/A‑4 with ConvertErrorAction
convert-pdf-to-pdfa4.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF to PDF/A‑4 while setting ConvertErrorAction to Convert to attempt conversion of problematic elements and log any errors.

add-text-file-attachment-pdfa3b.title: Add Text File Attachment to PDF/A‑3b Document
add-text-file-attachment-pdfa3b.description: Demonstrates how to embed an external text file as a file‑attachment annotation and then convert the PDF to PDF/A‑3b compliance.

add-xml-attachment-pdfa.title: Add XML Attachment to PDF/A‑1b Document
add-xml-attachment-pdfa.description: Converts a PDF to PDF/A‑1b compliance and attaches an external XML file to the resulting document.

convert-pdf-to-pdfa-font-substitution.title: Convert PDF to PDF/A with Font Substitution Fallback
convert-pdf-to-pdfa-font-substitution.description: Demonstrates how to convert a PDF to PDF/A while configuring FontEmbeddingOptions to substitute missing fonts with default fallback fonts.

convert-pdf-to-pdfa-auto-tagging.title: Convert PDF to PDF/A with Auto‑Tagging
convert-pdf-to-pdfa-auto-tagging.description: Shows how to enable auto‑tagging during PDF/A conversion by configuring AutoTaggingSettings on PdfFormatConversionOptions and saving the result.

epub-to-pdf-custom-page-size.title: Convert EPUB to PDF with Custom Page Size
epub-to-pdf-custom-page-size.description: Loads an EPUB file using EpubLoadOptions with a custom page size and saves it as a PDF document.

markdown-to-pdf.title: Convert Markdown to PDF preserving code blocks
markdown-to-pdf.description: Loads a Markdown file with MdLoadOptions and saves it as a PDF, keeping code block formatting.

pcl-to-pdf-hpgl2.title: Convert PCL to PDF with HP‑GL/2 Vector Loading
pcl-to-pdf-hpgl2.description: Loads a PCL file, enables HP‑GL/2 vector loading, and saves it as a PDF.

convert-ps-to-pdf.title: Convert PostScript to PDF
convert-ps-to-pdf.description: Loads a PostScript (.ps) file using PsLoadOptions and saves it as a PDF with default settings.

xml-to-pdf-xslfo.title: Convert XML to PDF using XSL‑FO Transformation
xml-to-pdf-xslfo.description: Loads an XML file, applies an XSL‑FO stylesheet, and saves the result as a PDF.

convert-xslfo-to-pdf.title: Convert XSL‑FO to PDF
convert-xslfo-to-pdf.description: Loads an XSL‑FO file using XslFoLoadOptions and saves it as a PDF with default settings.

convert-latex-to-pdf.title: Convert LaTeX File to PDF with Aspose.Pdf
convert-latex-to-pdf.description: Loads a .tex file using TeXLoadOptions and saves it as a PDF, preserving equations and formatting.

convert-ofd-to-pdf.title: Convert OFD to PDF
convert-ofd-to-pdf.description: Loads an OFD file using OfdLoadOptions and saves it as a PDF with default settings.

convert-pdf-to-epub.title: Convert PDF to EPUB
convert-pdf-to-epub.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF document to an EPUB file using Aspose.Pdf with default conversion settings.

pdf-to-epub-with-cover.title: Convert PDF to EPUB with Cover Image and Metadata
pdf-to-epub-with-cover.description: Converts a PDF file to EPUB format while setting custom metadata and a cover image.

convert-pdf-to-latex.title: Convert PDF to LaTeX using TeXSaveOptions
convert-pdf-to-latex.description: Loads a PDF file and saves it as a LaTeX (.tex) document, directing the generated files to a specified output directory.

pdf-to-latex-custom-macros.title: Convert PDF to LaTeX with Custom Macro Definitions
pdf-to-latex-custom-macros.description: Loads a PDF, converts it to TeX (LaTeX) using Aspose.Pdf, then inserts user‑defined macro definitions into the generated .tex file.

pdf-to-text.title: Convert PDF to Text using TextSaveOptions
pdf-to-text.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF document to a plain text file using Aspose.Pdf's TextSaveOptions with the default encoding.

pdf-to-utf8-text.title: Convert PDF to UTF-8 Text with Line Breaks
pdf-to-utf8-text.description: Extracts text from a PDF document using UTF‑8 encoding while preserving line breaks between pages.

extract-visible-text.title: Extract Visible Text from PDF (excluding hidden OCR layers)
extract-visible-text.description: Shows how to extract only the visible text from a PDF using TextAbsorber, ignoring hidden OCR sublayers.

convert-pdf-to-xps.title: Convert PDF to XPS using Aspose.Pdf
convert-pdf-to-xps.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF file and saving it as XPS using XpsSaveOptions with default settings.

convert-pdf-to-xps-custom-size.title: Convert PDF to XPS with Custom Page Size and Orientation
convert-pdf-to-xps-custom-size.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF document to XPS format while setting a custom page size and landscape orientation for all pages.

pdf-to-markdown.title: Convert PDF to Markdown using Aspose.Pdf
pdf-to-markdown.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF file and saving it as a Markdown document with default settings.

pdf-to-markdown-custom-headings.title: Convert PDF to Markdown with Custom Heading Levels
pdf-to-markdown-custom-headings.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF document to Markdown while configuring custom heading level mapping based on font size.

convert-pdf-to-mobixml.title: Convert PDF to MobiXml using Aspose.Pdf
convert-pdf-to-mobixml.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF file and saving it as MobiXml format with default MobiXmlSaveOptions.

convert-pdf-to-mobixml__v2.title: Convert PDF to MobiXml with Custom Metadata
convert-pdf-to-mobixml__v2.description: Loads a PDF, sets author and publisher metadata, and saves it as MobiXml using Aspose.Pdf.

pdf-to-png-bradley.title: Convert PDF pages to PNG with Bradley Binarization
pdf-to-png-bradley.description: Converts each page of a PDF to a PNG image and applies the Bradley binarization algorithm to enhance contrast.

pdf-to-png-transparent__v2.title: Convert PDF Pages to PNG with Transparent Background
pdf-to-png-transparent__v2.description: Converts each page of a PDF to a PNG image using a transparent background, suitable for pages that contain alpha channel content.

pdf-to-multi-page-tiff__v2.title: Convert PDF to Multi‑Page TIFF using TiffDevice
pdf-to-multi-page-tiff__v2.description: Demonstrates how to convert all pages of a PDF document into a single multi‑page TIFF image using Aspose.Pdf's TiffDevice with default compression.

create-single-page-tiff.title: Create Single-Page TIFF from PDF using TiffDevice
create-single-page-tiff.description: Converts the first page of a PDF document to a single-page TIFF image with custom resolution and compression settings.

pdf-to-svg-css-embedding.title: Convert PDF to SVG with CSS Embedding using DocumentDevice
pdf-to-svg-css-embedding.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF file to SVG format using DocumentDevice and enabling CSS style embedding.

convert-pdf-to-svg-documentdevice.title: Convert PDF to SVG using DocumentDevice
convert-pdf-to-svg-documentdevice.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF file to SVG files using DocumentDevice and SvgDevice, saving each page into a custom output folder.
